app.title: NovaStory · Short-Video Storyboard Creation
app.subtitle: An online study on human–AI co-creation

sidebar.topics_hint: Edit data/topics.json and refresh to apply changes; the first 3 topics are used in the experiment.
sidebar.reset_subject: Reset session for the next participant
sidebar.api_no_configs: No API configurations found. Please add at least one [[api_configs]] block to .streamlit/secrets.toml (see secrets.toml.example).
sidebar.api_key_missing: This configuration is missing an API key. Please add it to .streamlit/secrets.toml.

consent.title: Study Information and Informed Consent
consent.body:
Thank you for taking part in this study!

**What you will do**: You will create 3 short-video storyboard scripts on given topics, each with a different form of AI assistance, and answer a few short questions after each one. The whole session takes about **10-15 minutes**.

**Data**: We record the text you enter, your interactions with the system, and your questionnaire answers. Data are used for academic research only, analyzed anonymously, and nothing that could identify you will be published.

**Voluntary**: You may leave at any time by closing the page, with no negative consequences.

If you agree, please tick the box below and begin.
consent.agree: I have read the above and agree to take part in this study

screening.title: Background Questionnaire
screening.hint: The following questions are used for analysis only — they do not affect your participation. All single-choice, about 1 minute.
screening.ai_freq: How often do you use generative AI tools such as ChatGPT?
screening.published: Have you ever published short videos you created on platforms such as Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, or TikTok?
screening.background: Do you have a degree or professional experience in film, media, design, or a related field?
screening.written: Have you ever written a storyboard script or screenplay before?
screening.self_rating: How would you rate your own skill at storyboard scriptwriting? (1 = no skill at all, 7 = very skilled)
screening.quiz_section: Quick quiz (if you are not sure, choose "I don't know")
screening.quiz1: In filmmaking, what does "close-up" refer to?
screening.quiz1_opt1: Filming the entire scene from a distance
screening.quiz1_opt2: A close-range shot of a person's face or part of an object
screening.quiz1_opt3: A technique in which the camera moves quickly
screening.quiz2_opt1: The color tone and style of the image
screening.quiz2_opt2: How much of the subject is shown within the frame

round.title: Creation Round {i} / {n}
round.instr_C: In this round the AI will generate a complete {shot_count}-shot storyboard script directly from your idea; review it and submit. First, write your story idea in one or two sentences.
round.instr_D: In this round the AI generates a complete script first; you can then edit it directly, or tell the AI what to change (it can be abstract, e.g. "make it funnier"), and polish it as many times as you like. First, write your story idea in one or two sentences.
round.instr_E: In this round the AI will first ask you a few questions to understand what you want, then generate the script; afterwards you can keep being guided by the AI or edit the script directly until you are happy. First, write your story idea in one or two sentences.
round.intent_label: Your story idea (one or two sentences)
round.intent_placeholder: e.g., The main character discovers they dreamed every question on the exam the night before…
round.intent_scope: 🎬 First, picture a short story that fits **{total}s · {count} shots**.

q.title: A few questions about this round
q.hint: Please answer based on the script you just completed.
q.own1: I feel that this storyboard script is MY work.
q.own2: I feel a strong sense of ownership toward this script.
q.own3: This script reflects my own ideas and style.
q.soa1: During the creative process, I was the one directing where the content went.
q.soa2: The final outcome was under my control.
q.tlx1: This round of the task was very mentally demanding.
q.attention: This is an attention check; please select "2".
q.violation: To what extent did the final script go against your original intent?
q.shots_hint: For each shot, choose the description that fits best.
q.shot_tag_label: The content of this shot is…
q.whole_tag_label: Overall, the content of this script is…
q.tag_ai_ok: Mostly the AI's, but I approve of it
q.imagine: How close is the final script to what you pictured in your mind?

done.title: All done — thank you for participating! 🎉
done.message: All of your data has been recorded successfully. Here is your completion code:
done.code_hint: If you joined through a recruitment platform, please enter the completion code there; otherwise you may simply close this page.

errors.no_api_key: The system API is not configured. Please contact the researcher.
errors.llm_failed: AI request failed: {error}. Please click any button to retry in a moment, or contact the researcher.
errors.outline_empty: The outline is empty. Please fill in the outline first.
errors.intent_too_short: Please make your idea more specific (at least {n} characters).
errors.answer_all: Some questions are still unanswered. Please answer all of them before submitting.
errors.answer_or_skip: Please pick an option, write your own, or leave it to the AI.
errors.revision_empty: Please tell the AI what you want changed first.

postgen.title: Current script (version {v}, directly editable)
postgen.edit_hint: You can edit the script above directly — your changes are saved automatically when you submit or hand it to the AI.
postgen.submit: I'm happy with it — submit this version

d.revision_label: Tell the AI what to change
d.revision_placeholder: e.g. make it funnier / cut the dialogue in shot 2 / twist the ending
d.revision_hint: You can give an abstract direction or specific edits; or just edit the script above yourself.

guidance.wait: The AI is preparing questions for you — this takes about a minute…
guidance.title: Build your story together with the AI
guidance.pick_label: Pick the option closest to what you have in mind
guidance.continue_btn: Let the AI keep guiding me
guidance.fallback_q: In a few words, what direction or details do you still want?
